name: Housing - Average Apartment Rent
description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: Property Sale History
description: For every real estate property in Arlington which has been sold, this dataset includes property sales information and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode).

name: Active Business Licenses
description:
All businesses operating in Arlington must be licensed and renewed annually. This dataset includes all active business licenses, excluding in-home businesses for privacy purposes.

To search active business licenses please see viewer here: https://dashboard.data.arlingtonva.us/business-license-viewer

name: Active Dog Licenses
description: All pet dogs are required to be licensed in Arlington, excluding service dogs. This dataset includes all active dog licenses.

name: Traffic Cameras
description: Traffic cameras are used on some Arlington street intersections to facilitate traffic management. This dataset includes all traffic cameras in use and their locations.

name: Assessment
description: Historical assessment information for all Arlington properties, identified by an RPC (Real Property Code). Associate with Property table to obtain address.

name: Permit Application Comments
description: For all submitted permit applications which include plan review, this dataset includes comments from the plan reviewers are included.

name: Property
description: This dataset includes every real estate property in Arlington and general information about that property, including address and property use and legal description and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode).

name: Employment - Unemployment Rate
description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: Property Class Type
description: This dataset provides the list of real estate property class/use type codes and their descriptions and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the PropertyClassTypeCode.

name: FOIA Requests
description: This dataset includes FOIA requests and associated information processed by the County Manager’s Office.

name: Households - Average Household Size
description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: Community Services Resources - Libraries
description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: Property Site Plan Property Lookup
description: A site plan is a request by an Arlington property owner to use multiple properties in a different manner than they are zoned for. This dataset includes information about submitted site plan applications including description, comments and usage square footage and can be associated with Real Estate Property Site Plan by SitePlanProeprtyKey.

name: Housing - Average Assessed Value
description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: Permit Application History
description: This dataset includes a history of all submitted permit requests, such as building, right of way and traffic permits, and information about each permit such as application dates and status.  It may contain multiple versions of each permit.

name: Property Address
description: For every real estate property in Arlington, this dataset includes at least a primary address and may include additional addresses for properties with multiple entrances, e.g., apartment building and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode).

name: All Staff History
description: Information about all current and most previous staff members (Employee, Contractor, Non-compensated) of Arlington County.  This includes name, contact, organizational information.  It is sourced from both the Prism System (Employee) and Active Directory (Employee, Contractor, Non-compensated).  This shows some history of staff data changes over time versus the all_staff table which shows current state.

name: Vehicular Violations: Traffic Summons and Parking Citations
description: Traffic summons are issued by uniformed police officers when a vehicle is pulled over for a traffic violation. Parking citations are issued by parking enforcement staff when a parking violation has occurred. Collectively, these violations reflect police incidents related to vehicular activity. This dataset includes the violation type, charge description and location of the violation.

name: Households - Household Income
description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: Budget Specialist
description: Information about the set of staff members who are authorized to act as budget specialists who can approve the provisioning of wireless devices to other staff in their organization.

name: 2016 iTree Eco Study Results - Species Distribution
description: Species distribution of plots in 2016 i-Tree Eco study, including percent cover and species composition. Study performed every five years.

name: Arlington County Permanent Position Vacancies
description: This dataset includes information such as department, job title and, where available, data vacated for all Arlington County Government permanent position vacancies.

name: Employee Demographics
description: List of Arlington County employees in permanent positions at the start of the current Fiscal Year. Data includes demographic information as well as the employee’s Department and Job Title.

name: Active Staff
description: Lists individual staff members, both employees and contractors, who are currently working for Arlington County

name: 2015 Constituent Satisfaction Survey Results
description:
The Constituent Satisfaction Survey is the County's comprehensive survey that assesses resident satisfaction with County services. Arlington County conducted its first comprehensive satisfaction survey in 2004. The County uses the survey results as an additional tool to measure its performance and enable more effective management of community services. The original survey results and survey instruments can be accessed on the County website via the provided links:


2018 Survey - Results / Instru

name: Accessory Dwelling Applications
description: An accessory dwelling (AD) is a complete independent dwelling unit (with kitchen + bath) designed, arranged, used, or intended for occupancy by not more than 3 persons for living purposes and under the same ownership as main dwelling on the lot.

name: Mixed Use Assessment
description: Mixed use properties have a combination of commercial activity (e.g., retail) and residential living (e.g., apartments). These properties are valued according to their use and this dataset provides the breakdown of valuation between the commercial and residential use.

These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: 2012 Constitution Satisfaction Survey Results
description:
The Constituent Satisfaction Survey is the County's comprehensive survey that assesses resident satisfaction with County services. Arlington County conducted its first comprehensive satisfaction survey in 2004. The County uses the survey results as an additional tool to measure its performance and enable more effective management of community services. The original survey results and survey instruments can be accessed on the County website via the provided links:


2018 Survey - Results / Instru

name: Water Recreation Facility Inspections
description: The Arlington County Division of Public Health inspects all licensed water recreation facilities in Arlington County that use re-circulated and treated water. description: Historical record of Arlington population as captured by the 1920 census record.

description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: Property Resubdivision - Deleted Property
description: A resubdivision involves the adjustment of Arlington property boundaries and sometimes results in the removal of a property in favor of subset  properties. This dataset contains all real estate properties removed as the result of a resubdivision and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode).

name: Residential Dwellings Porches
description: This dataset includes information about the porches of residential dwellings in Arlington  and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode)

name: Events
description: Historical record of calendar events as registered on Arlington Today, including events posted by Arlington employees as well as some events hosted by third parties.

name: Stop Work Order and Unsafe Building Notices
description: This dataset includes a list of all real estate properties for which a stop work order - requiring a cessation of construction/development work or an unsafe building notice have been issued.

name: Property Resubdivision - Added Property
description: A resubdivision involves the adjustment of Arlington property boundaries and sometimes results in the creation of additional subset  properties. This dataset contains all real estate properties created as the result of a resubdivision and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode).

name: Commercial Rehabilitation Exemptions
description: Commercial rehabilitation exemptions are applied to approved properties as an incentive to rehabilitate existing properties. Dataset includes all active exemptions, effective and expiration dates and exemption amounts.

name: Residential Dwellings Outbuildings
description: Residential outbuildings include garages, sheds, carports, swimming pools, gazebos and other structures associated with the dwelling. This dataset includes the structure type and square footage and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode).

name: Property Tax Exemption History
description: For every real estate property in Arlington which has had a tax-exempt status at least once since 2000, this dataset provides the property tax exemption history and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode).

name: Residential Dwellings Interior
description: This dataset includes information about the interiors of residential dwellings in Arlington such as square footage and bedroom count,  and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode)

name: Education - Resident Educational Attainment
description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: Locations For Events
description: This dataset includes available locations for event registration, including location and parking availability

description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. name: Property Rezoning Case
description: A Rezoning request is submitted when an Arlington property owner wishes to use the property in a manner different than what it is zoned for. This dataset includes all rezoning requests, including status, nature of request and comments and can be associated to Real Estate Property Rezoning Case Property by RezoningCaseKey.

name: Building Energy Usage
description: Energy usage and usage type for County-owned or occupied buildings

name: Development Projects
description: Most property in Arlington is developed or protected. This dataset includes a listing of all the completed development projects.

name: Employee Postal Codes by Department
description: List of the home address postal codes for Arlington County employees in permanent positions at the start of the current Fiscal Year.

name: Population - Population Migration
description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. These datasets are used to obtain an understanding of community, plan future services/needs, guide policy decisions, and secure grant funding. A PDF Version of the Arlington Profile can be accessed on the Arlington County website.

name: Property Resubdivision Project
description: A resubdivision involves the adjustment of Arlington property boundaries. This dataset includes information about the resubdivision  such as neighborhood, project year and  completed date and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode).

description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services. name: Trade Names
description: A Trade Name is a name used by a business owner that is different than that which is registered by the State Corporation Commission. This data set contains all recorded Arlington Trade Names and includes the recordation date and business owner(s).

name: Valuation-Related Building Permits
description: For every real estate property in Arlington which has had a building permit application that impacts the value of that property, this dataset includes permit information relevant to the adjusted valuation and can be associated with other Real Estate datasets by the RPC (RealEstatePropertyCode).

name: Food Service Inspections
description: List of results for inspections performed at permitted food service facilities.

name: Performance Parking History
description: History of Parking Activity for those areas included in the performance parking project. Data for this project was collected using surface-based parking sensors.

name: Households - Household Poverty Status
description: The Arlington Profile combines countywide data sources and provides a comprehensive outlook of the most current data on population, housing, employment, development, transportation, and community services.
